items.title: Investing.com’s stocks of the week
items.description: Investing.com -- U.S. stocks were somewhat mixed on Friday just after midday. However, the S&P, Nasdaq and Dow Jones Industrial Average are on course for weekly gains. We have also seen some interesting moves by individual stock names.
